scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (dashboards, folders, datasources, org_users, alert_rules); the full Grafana surface (dashboard/datasource/alert-rule create/update/delete, annotations, teams, service accounts, snapshots, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /api/dashboards/db is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/api/datasources is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/api/annotations is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/api/teams/search is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/api/serviceaccounts/search is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it

/api/dashboards/uid/{uid} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
